# vash — CLI for vas-hosting.cz

`vash` is a command-line tool for managing vas-hosting.cz hosting services: domains, databases, DNS, email, FTP, and servers.

## Installation

```sh
brew tap CreevekCZ/tap
brew install vash
```

## Authentication

Every API command requires an active account. API keys are obtained from https://portal.vas-hosting.cz/api-key

```sh
vash auth login --name personal --api-key <key>   # add account
vash auth list                                     # list accounts
vash auth switch <name>                            # switch active account
vash auth current                                  # show active account
vash auth logout <name>                            # remove account
```

Multiple accounts are supported. Override per-command with `--account <name>`.

## Output formats

All API commands accept `--format table` (default, human-readable) or `--format json` (machine-readable).

```sh
vash server list --format json
```

JSON errors are written to stderr as `{"error":"<message>","code":"<code>"}`.
Error codes: `unauthorized`, `not_found`, `api_error`, `unexpected_status`.

## Commands

### account

```sh
vash account invoices                                           # list unpaid invoices
vash account pay-invoice <variableSymbol>                       # pay invoice with credit
```

### domain

```sh
vash domain info <domain>                                       # show domain details
vash domain change-php <domain> --version <version>            # change PHP version
```

### database

```sh
vash database list <domain>
vash database create <domain> --name <name> --type <mysql|postgresql> --password <pass> [--encoding <enc>] [--note <note>]
vash database change-password <domain> <database> --password <pass>
vash database backup <domain> <database>
vash database delete <domain> <database>
```

### dns

```sh
vash dns list <domain>
vash dns create <domain> --name <name> --type <A|AAAA|CNAME|MX|TXT|NS|SRV|CAA> --content <value> --ttl <seconds> [--priority <n>] [--note <note>]
vash dns edit <domain> <recordId> --name <name> --type <type> --content <value> --ttl <seconds> [--priority <n>]
vash dns delete <domain> <recordId>
```

### email

```sh
vash email list <domain>
vash email create <domain> --name <name> --display-name <name> --password <pass> [--quota <mb>]
vash email change-password <domain> <email> --password <pass>
vash email change-quota <domain> <email> --quota <mb>
vash email create-alias <domain> <email> --alias <alias>
vash email delete-alias <domain> <email> --alias <alias>
vash email auto-reply <domain> <email> --enabled <true|false> [--subject <s>] [--message <m>]
vash email forwarding <domain> <email> --forward-to <address>
vash email delete <domain> <email>
```

### ftp

```sh
vash ftp list <domain>
vash ftp create <domain> --name <name> --directory <dir> --password <pass> [--quota <mb>]
vash ftp change-password <domain> <ftp> --password <pass>
vash ftp change-quota <domain> <ftp> --quota <mb>
vash ftp lock <domain> <ftp>
vash ftp unlock <domain> <ftp>
vash ftp delete <domain> <ftp>
```

### server

```sh
vash server list [--labels <label1,label2>]
vash server info <hostname>
vash server reboot <hostname>
vash server list-vds
vash server install-vps <hostname> --cpu <mhz> --ram <gib> --storage-size <gb> --storage-location <slot> --os <id> [--server-name <name>] [--ip-address <ip>]
vash server assign-label <hostname> --label <label>
vash server unassign-label <hostname> --label <label>
```

### server-label

```sh
vash server-label list
vash server-label create --name <name> [--color <hex>]
vash server-label edit <name> --new-name <name> [--color <hex>]
vash server-label delete <name>
```

### infrastructure

```sh
vash infrastructure list-os      # list available OS images (use ID with server install-vps --os)
vash infrastructure list-ips     # list available IP addresses
```

## Common workflows

```sh
# Provision a new VPS
vash infrastructure list-os --format json
vash infrastructure list-ips --format json
vash server install-vps vds1.example.com --cpu 3200 --ram 4 --storage-size 80 --storage-location 1 --os ubuntu-22.04

# Add a DNS record
vash dns create example.com --name @ --type A --content 1.2.3.4 --ttl 3600

# Create a database
vash database create example.com --name myapp --type mysql --password s3cr3t

# Create an email account
vash email create example.com --name info --display-name "Info" --password s3cr3t --quota 2048
```
